step_rationale: Pro-apoptotic cytokine linked to left-ventricular remodeling and injury.
mechanism: TRAIL promotes apoptosis in plaque macrophages and contributes to ventricular remodeling; inverse LVEF correlation reflects cardiomyocyte loss and dysfunction.

references.title: Using proximity extension proteomics assay to identify biomarkers associated with infarct size and ejection fraction after ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
